top3.sql:
SELECT r.text, c.artist, c.hasFoil, c.hasNonFoil, c.colors, c.convertedManaCost, c.power, c.toughness
FROM cards c
JOIN rulings r ON c.uuid = r.uuid
WHERE c.artist = 'Jim Pavelec';

SELECT r.text
FROM cards c
JOIN rulings r ON c.uuid = r.uuid
WHERE c.artist = 'Jim Pavelec';

SELECT r.text, c.artist, c.hasFoil, c.hasNonFoil, c.colors, c.convertedManaCost, c.power, c.toughness
FROM cards c
JOIN rulings r ON c.uuid = r.uuid
WHERE c.artist = 'Jim Pavelec';

SELECT r.text
FROM cards c
JOIN rulings r ON c.uuid = r.uuid
WHERE c.artist = 'Jim Pavelec';

SELECT c.artist, c.faceName, r.date, r.text
FROM cards c
JOIN rulings r ON c.uuid = r.uuid
WHERE c.artist = 'Jim Pavelec';

SELECT DISTINCT c.faceName, r.text, 
       CASE 
           WHEN c.hand IS NULL OR c.hand = '' THEN 'Missing hand property'
           ELSE 'OK'
       END AS hand_status,
       CASE 
           WHEN c.convertedManaCost IS NULL THEN 'Missing convertedManaCost property'
           ELSE 'OK'
       END AS cmc_status,

           ELSE 'OK'
